keyFactors: The numbers indicating the amount of successes and failures that each choice had.

strategy: I based my decisions primarily on the amount of successes of the candidates, also taking into account the ratio of success to failure.

strategy: I decided to vote for the candidate with the second highest number of successes because they may be more motivated to succeed more and fail less.

keyFactors: The success/failure ratio influenced my decision.
strategy: I based my decision purely on the ratio between success and failure.

keyFactors: The main factors that influenced my decisions were the success rates of each group or if they failed me.
strategy: I chose the groups with the most successes at the beginning, but as time went on I started choosing different groups with better success-to-failure rates. If a group failed me, I would choose another group that I thought might have a better success rate.
